name: Dry Rub Spice Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix thoroughly.
2. If not using immediately, store the marinade in a tightly capped jar.
3. Before cooking, generously rub the mixture onto all sides of the meat using your fingers.
4. Allow the meat to stand at room temperature for two hours, or refrigerate it lightly covered overnight.
5. Sprinkle the meat lightly with additional seasoning before grilling, broiling, or baking.
6. This recipe is suitable for 3-4 pounds of spareribs and can also be used on poultry.
7. The marinade will keep indefinitely when stored in a tightly capped jar.
